productDisplayName: Spice Art Women White Beaded Elastic Flower Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this spice art clutch, customised for the ethnic diva in you. Show off your ethno-western side with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Width: 29.5 cm Height: 13 cm Raw silk upper with a beaded flower embellishment on the right and bead embellishments along the opening border Has a clasp button closure One zippered pocket and a pouch on the inside Care Wipe surface with a dry clean cloth
